# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Main
on: [push]
jobs:
    build:
        name: "Build NodeJs"
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest

        strategy:
            matrix:
                node:
                    - 'lts/*'
                    - 12
                    - 14
        steps:

            # checkout
            - uses: actions/checkout@v3
              with:
                  ref: main
                  fetch-depth: 0
                  submodules: recursive

            # npm install
            - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node }}
              run: nvm use --no-progress ${{ matrix.node }}
              env:
                NVM_NODEJS_ORG_MIRROR: https://nodejs.org/dist
                NVM_IOJS_ORG_MIRROR: https://iojs.org/dist

            - name: Get the cache dir path
              id: get-cache-dir-path
              run: echo ::set-output name=dir::$(npm config get cache)

            # cache npm
            - uses: actions/cache@v3
              with:
                  path: ${{ steps.get-cache-dir-path.outputs.dir }}
                  key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node }}-npm
                  restore-keys: |
                      ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node }}-npm

            - run: npm install
            # cache pip
            - uses: actions/setup-python@v4
              with:
                python-version: 3.x

            - name: Install Python dependencies
              run: pip install flake8
            - name: Run pylint
              run: |
                pip list | grep pylint-pypackage
                pylint ./src/*.py
